# fly_mpg_database (Resource)

Manages a database in a Fly.io Managed Postgres (MPG) cluster. Import using cluster_id/database_name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_mpg_database" "example" {
  cluster_id = fly_mpg_cluster.example.id
  name       = "my_database"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) The ID of the MPG cluster. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `name` (String) The name of the database. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the database.
